'''magate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vampishly|vampishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vampishly|vampishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| magate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:magate|magate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:magatesher|magatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magatesherĂ«m|magatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:magatero|magatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:magateshĂ«|magateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magateshĂ«m|magateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimagatero|gokimagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimagateshĂ«|gokimagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagateshĂ«m|gokimagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomagankerom|gomagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomagankeshĂ«|gomagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagankeshĂ«m|gomagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomagankeya|gomagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:magaterom|magaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magatemu|magatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:magateya|magateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimagaterom|gokimagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagatemu|gokimagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimagateya|gokimagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:magagate|magagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:magagatesher|magagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magagatesherĂ«m|magagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:magagatero|magagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:magagateshĂ«|magagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magagateshĂ«m|magagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimagagatero|gokimagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimagagateshĂ«|gokimagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagagateshĂ«m|gokimagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomagagankerom|gomagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomagagankeshĂ«|gomagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagagankeshĂ«m|gomagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomagagankeya|gomagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:magagaterom|magagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magagatemu|magagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:magagateya|magagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimagagaterom|gokimagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagagatemu|gokimagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimagagateya|gokimagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠte|mĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠtesher|mĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠtero|mĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠgĂŠtero|gokimĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠterom|mĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠtemu|mĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠgĂŠteya|mĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠgĂŠterom|gokimĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠgĂŠteya|gokimĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafgafte|mafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafgaftesher|mafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafgaftesherĂ«m|mafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafgaftero|mafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafgafteshĂ«|mafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafgafteshĂ«m|mafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafgaftero|gokimafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafgafteshĂ«|gokimafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafgafteshĂ«m|gokimafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafgafnkerom|gomafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafgafnkeshĂ«|gomafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafgafnkeshĂ«m|gomafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafgafnkeya|gomafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafgafterom|mafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafgaftemu|mafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafgafteya|mafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafgafterom|gokimafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafgaftemu|gokimafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafgafteya|gokimafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
